summary: AI Scene Generator feature testing complete. Backend API (2 endpoints) 100% working. Frontend UI (11 features) 100% working. Scene generation via Gemini Nano Banana takes 15-25 seconds. All key features verified: button visibility logic, loading states, scene preview, session background carry-over, and color change reset.
test_credentials: No auth required for scene-gen endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Scene Generator fully functional. Backend endpoints: POST /api/scene-gen/generate (accepts resonance_name, colors, mood, source_prompt), GET /api/scene-gen/image/{filename}. Generation takes 15-25 seconds via Gemini Nano Banana. Key data-testids: light-generate-scene (button), light-scene-preview (background in preview), light-session-scene-bg (background in immersive session). Button only visible when 2+ colors selected. Selecting new colors clears sceneUrl state.

tests_executed.test: Backend: POST /api/scene-gen/generate returns image_url, prompt_used, resonance_name
tests_executed.details: Verified via curl - returns valid JSON with /api/scene-gen/image/{filename} URL

tests_executed.test: Frontend: Generate AI Scene button NOT visible with 1 color
tests_executed.details: Button correctly hidden when only 1 color selected

tests_executed.test: Frontend: Generate AI Scene button visible with 2+ colors
Frontend: Button shows 'Generating Scene...' with spinner during generation
Frontend: Button changes to 'Regenerate Scene' after completion
Frontend: Scene preview background appears (data-testid: light-scene-preview)
tests_executed.details: Background div visible with generated image

tests_executed.test: Frontend: Scene carries into immersive session (data-testid: light-session-scene-bg)
Frontend: Selecting new colors clears scene
tests_executed.details: Scene preview cleared after adding 3rd color

tests_executed.test: Regression: Blend indicator visible with 2+ colors
tests_executed.details: Shows color dots and blended result
Changed to Mineral style, name updated to 'Solar Flare'

feature_verification.backend_generate: WORKING - POST /api/scene-gen/generate returns image_url, prompt_used, resonance_name
feature_verification.backend_error_handling: WORKING - Returns {error: 'Image not found'} for missing files
feature_verification.frontend_button_visibility: WORKING - Only shows with 2+ colors selected
feature_verification.frontend_scene_preview: WORKING - Background appears behind Light Therapy content
feature_verification.frontend_session_background: WORKING - Scene carries into immersive session
feature_verification.frontend_color_change_reset: WORKING - Selecting new colors clears sceneUrl

performance_notes: Scene generation via Gemini Nano Banana takes 15-25 seconds. Frontend uses polling approach (2s intervals, up to 50s timeout) to detect completion.
